channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INDOKEM] Indokem Ltd: Promoter & Promoters Group Disclose 68.67% Shareholding in Yearly SEBI Filing
item.description:
Indokem Ltd, a company based in Mumbai, has disclosed its yearly shareholding pattern under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulation, 2011. The filing, made by Chairman and Managing Director Mahendra K. Khatau, reveals that the Promoter & Promoters Group held 1,91,50,083 (68.67%) Equity Shares as of March 31, 2026. The declaration also states that no encumbrance of Equity Shares was made directly or indirectly during the financial year ended on the same date, except those already disclosed to the Stock Exchange. The Promoter Group includes entities such as Asha Marine Products Private Limited, Emerald Capital Services Private Limited, Khatau Holdings And Trading Company Private Limited, Khatau Leasing and Finance Company Private Limited, and individuals like Mahendra K. Khatau, Shreya S. Singhania, Rheyna Khatau, and Nirvaan Singhania.

  • Promoter & Promoters Group held 68.67% shares in Indokem Ltd as of March 31, 2026
  • No encumbrance of Equity Shares was made directly or indirectly during the financial year
  • The declaration includes entities like Asha Marine Products Private Limited, Emerald Capital Services Private Limited, Khatau Holdings And Trading Company Private Limited, Khatau Leasing and Finance Company Private Limited
  • Includes individuals like Mahendra K. Khatau, Shreya S. Singhania, Rheyna Khatau, and Nirvaan Singhania

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDOKEM LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HFIL] Himalaya Food International Ltd. to Increase Authorised Share Capital and Appoint New Auditor
item.description:
Himalaya Food International Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on 7th April 2026 to consider several matters. These include increasing the authorized share capital from ₹90,00,00,000 to ₹150,00,00,000, appointing M/s Kumar Rupak & Associates as the new Statutory Auditor, and ratifying the release of ₹21.50 Crores to consortium banks for concluding the One Time Settlement (OTS) of ₹43 Crores. The Board will also consider enabling provisions for raising funds, including the conversion of outstanding loans into equity shares, and the issuance of equity shares or other eligible securities to promoters and/or eligible investors. Additionally, the Board will consider convening an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the members of the Company.

  • Board meeting scheduled on 7th April 2026
  • Increase in authorized share capital from ₹90,00,00,000 to ₹150,00,00,000
  • Appointment of M/s Kumar Rupak & Associates as Statutory Auditor
  • Ratification of release of ₹21.50 Crores to consortium banks
  • Consideration of enabling provisions for raising funds

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Himalaya Food International Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VSL] Viram Suvarn Ltd Promoters Submit No Encumbrance Declaration for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Viram Suvarn Ltd promoters have submitted a declaration under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulation, 2011. The declaration states that no encumbrances, direct or indirect, were made during the year ended on 31st March, 2026. This disclosure was made in accordance with the takeovers regulations and the promoters have requested that the declaration be kept on record.

  • Viram Suvarn Ltd promoters have submitted a declaration under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulation, 2011.
  • The declaration states that no encumbrances were made during the year ended on 31st March, 2026.
  • The disclosure was made in accordance with the takeovers regulations.
  • The promoters have requested that the declaration be kept on record.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Veeram Securities Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [KALYANI] Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd Submits Annual Declaration for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd, in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, has submitted the annual declaration from the Promoter(s) and Promoter Group for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The declaration states that no encumbrance or pledge, directly or indirectly, was made during the financial year. The Promoter(s) & Promoter Group includes Jayashree Kumar, Pradyut Kumar, Naresh Kumar, PBK Consultants Private Limited, Feeroz Khan, Javed Aslam, Nathmal Bangani, Visisth Services Limited, Muskan Bangani, and Kamala Kumari Jain.

  • Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd submits annual declaration for FY 2025-2026
  • No encumbrance or pledge made by Promoter(s) & Promoter Group during the financial year
  • Promoter(s) & Promoter Group includes Jayashree Kumar, Pradyut Kumar, Naresh Kumar, PBK Consultants Private Limited, Feeroz Khan, Javed Aslam, Nathmal Bangani, Visisth Services Limited, Muskan Bangani, and Kamala Kumari Jain

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [HINDCOPPER] Hindustan Copper Ltd Reports Strong Operational Performance in FY 2025-26
item.description:
Hindustan Copper Limited (HCL) has reported a robust performance for the financial year 2025-26, marked by significant operational achievements. The company achieved a 9% increase in MIC (Metal in concentrate) production, a 6% increase in ore production, and the best sales in the last five years. These achievements are driven by coordinated efforts across key functional domains and a focus on continuous improvement. HCL is making steady progress towards its strategic objective of achieving 12.2 MTPA mining capacity by 2030. The company also implemented several welfare initiatives, rolled out new software, and signed an MoU with the State Bank of India for a corporate salary package.

  • Achieved 9% higher MIC production than FY 2024-25 and highest in past seven years
  • Achieved 6% higher ore production than last year
  • Best sales of Copper MIC in the last five years
  • Implemented welfare initiatives for officers, workmen and contract personnel
  • Signed MoU with the State Bank of India for implementation of Corporate Salary Package

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN COPPER LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [PEARLPOLY] PEARL Polymers Ltd Revises Board Meeting Outcome, Re-appoints Independent Director Mr. Anant Kanoi
item.description:
PEARL Polymers Ltd has revised the outcome of their Board Meeting held on February 12, 2026. The revision includes the re-appointment of Mr. Anant Kanoi as an Independent Director for a second term of five years, subject to the approval of the company's members. The company has also approved the unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025.

  • PEARL Polymers Ltd revises the outcome of their Board Meeting held on February 12, 2026
  • Mr. Anant Kanoi is re-appointed as an Independent Director for a second term of five years
  • The re-appointment of Mr. Kanoi is subject to the approval of the company's members
  • The company has approved the unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025
  • The financial results have been reviewed by Goel Goyal & Co., Chartered Accountants

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PEARL POLYMERS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MOIL] Moil Ltd Announces New General Manager Appointment
item.description:
Moil Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Manish Malewar as the new General Manager (Personnel) with effect from 4th April 2026. Mr. Malewar holds a B.Sc., PGDLS, and LLB degree and has been designated as the Head of Department. The appointment is in accordance with the service rules of MOIL.

  • Moil Ltd appoints Mr. Manish Malewar as General Manager (Personnel)
  • Mr. Malewar holds B.Sc., PGDLS, and LLB degrees
  • Effective from 4th April 2026
  • Designated as HoD
  • Appointment in line with MOIL service rules

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MOIL LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MEDICAPQ] SEBI Opens Special Window for Transfer and Dematerialization of Physical Securities at Medi Caps Ltd.
item.description:
Medi Caps Ltd. has announced that the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) has opened a special window for transfer and dematerialization of physical securities. This window is for securities sold or purchased before April 01, 2019, and it will remain open from February 05, 2026, to February 04, 2027. The securities transferred will be mandatorily credited to the transferee in demat mode and will be under lock-in for a period of one year from the date of registration of transfer. Shareholders are requested to furnish the required documents to the Company’s Registrar and Share Transfer Agents (RTA), Ankit Consultancy Private Limited, for this opportunity.

  • SEBI has opened a special window for transfer and dematerialization of physical securities at Medi Caps Ltd.
  • The window is for securities sold or purchased before April 01, 2019.
  • The window will remain open from February 05, 2026, to February 04, 2027.
  • Securities transferred will be under lock-in for a period of one year.
  • Shareholders are requested to furnish required documents to the RTA, Ankit Consultancy Private Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MEDI-CAPS LTD.-$ | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [OSCARGLO] Oscar Global Ltd: Major Resignations and Appointments of Directors, Including New Chairman & MD
item.description:
Oscar Global Ltd has seen significant changes in its board members. Mr. Karan Kanika Verma has resigned from his positions as Director, Managing Director, and Chairman. Three new additional directors have been appointed: Mr. Gopal Bhatter, Ms. Sonia Bhatter, and Ms. Monika Bhatter. Two other directors, Mr. Radheshyam Pandey and Mr. Arvind Ganpat Desai, have also been appointed as additional directors and Independent Directors. Furthermore, three directors, Mr. Pawan Chadha, Ms. Nishu, and Mr. Sanjeev Rathore, have resigned. Ms. Nitasha Sinha has also resigned from her posts. The company has approved the re-classification of several individuals and entities from 'promoter category' to 'public'. Lastly, Ms. Neelam Shaboo has been appointed as the Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

  • Resignation of Mr. Karan Kanika Verma from multiple positions.
  • Appointment of Mr. Gopal Bhatter as Chairman & MD.
  • Appointment of three new additional directors and two Independent Directors.
  • Resignation of three directors: Mr. Pawan Chadha, Ms. Nishu, and Mr. Sanjeev Rathore.
  • Appointment of Ms. Neelam Shaboo as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OSCAR GLOBAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [OSCARGLO] Oscar Global Ltd: Appointment of New Directors and Resignation of Existing Ones
item.description:
In a recent board meeting held on 4th April 2026, Oscar Global Ltd announced the appointment of five new directors and the resignation of six directors. The new appointees include Mr. Gopal Bhatter, Ms. Sonia Bhatter, Ms. Monika Bhatter, Mr. Radheshyam Pandey, and Mr. Arvind Ganpat Desai. The resignations include Ms. Nishu, Mr. Sanjeev Rathore, Ms. Monam Kapoor, Mr. Pawan Chadha, Mr. Karan Kanika Verma, and Ms. Nitasha Sinha. The company also announced the re-classification of several individuals and entities from 'promoter category' to 'public'. Ms. Neelam Shaboo was appointed as the new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

  • Appointment of five new directors: Mr. Gopal Bhatter, Ms. Sonia Bhatter, Ms. Monika Bhatter, Mr. Radheshyam Pandey, and Mr. Arvind Ganpat Desai.
  • Resignation of six directors: Ms. Nishu, Mr. Sanjeev Rathore, Ms. Monam Kapoor, Mr. Pawan Chadha, Mr. Karan Kanika Verma, and Ms. Nitasha Sinha.
  • Re-classification of several individuals and entities from 'promoter category' to 'public'.
  • Appointment of Ms. Neelam Shaboo as the new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OSCAR GLOBAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
